controls.name: Prompt Injection
controls.description: The AI system improperly handles adversarial or untrusted prompt inputs that manipulate system behavior.
controls.severity_guidance: Impacts integrity, data exposure, and downstream system control.
what_to_look_for: Identify architectural safeguards and enforcement mechanisms implemented to address Prompt Injection.
Review authentication, authorization, validation, rate limiting, monitoring, and logging controls relevant to this risk.
Verify presence of automated tests, red-team evaluations, or CI security checks validating this control.
typical_mitigations: Implement enforceable technical safeguards aligned to Prompt Injection.
Integrate automated security testing or red-teaming into CI/CD pipelines.
Restrict privileges and validate inputs/outputs where applicable.
Produce structured logs or reports demonstrating enforcement.

gap_example.title: Prompt Injection not evidenced
gap_example.evidence_summary: No reliable technical or operational evidence discovered to demonstrate coverage of OWASP-A01.
evidence: No validation, testing, configuration, or monitoring artifact found.

covered_example.title: Prompt Injection partially met — some evidence found

evidence.note: Input sanitisation and prompt boundary enforcement logic.
Automated prompt injection test suite.

covered_example.remediation: Implement enforceable technical safeguards aligned to Prompt Injection.

notes: Requires validation of runtime enforcement, monitoring outputs, red-team results, or operational safeguards beyond static asset metadata.

controls.name: Insecure Output Handling
controls.description: Failure to validate or sanitize model outputs before downstream use.
controls.severity_guidance: May lead to code execution, injection, or data exfiltration.
what_to_look_for: Identify architectural safeguards and enforcement mechanisms implemented to address Insecure Output Handling.
Review authentication, authorization, validation, rate limiting, monitoring, and logging controls relevant to this risk.
Verify presence of automated tests, red-team evaluations, or CI security checks validating this control.
typical_mitigations: Implement enforceable technical safeguards aligned to Insecure Output Handling.
Integrate automated security testing or red-teaming into CI/CD pipelines.
Restrict privileges and validate inputs/outputs where applicable.
Produce structured logs or reports demonstrating enforcement.

gap_example.title: Insecure Output Handling not evidenced
gap_example.evidence_summary: No reliable technical or operational evidence discovered to demonstrate coverage of OWASP-A02.
evidence: No validation, testing, configuration, or monitoring artifact found.

covered_example.title: Insecure Output Handling partially met — some evidence found

evidence.note: Output encoding and sanitisation before rendering.
Middleware stripping sensitive tokens from LLM responses.

covered_example.remediation: Implement enforceable technical safeguards aligned to Insecure Output Handling.

notes: Requires validation of runtime enforcement, monitoring outputs, red-team results, or operational safeguards beyond static asset metadata.
